name: peercord
description: Peercord, A P2P Discord clone powered by Pear Runtime
author: Mastercodeon

scripts.package: npm run bump && npm run build:ui && electron-forge package
scripts.package:win: npm run build:ui && electron-forge package --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:ui && electron-forge package --platform darwin --arch arm64
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:ui && electron-forge package --platform linux --arch x64
scripts.make: npm run bump && npm run build:ui && electron-forge make
scripts.make:win: npm run build:ui && electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.make:mac: npm run build:ui && electron-forge make --platform darwin --arch arm64
scripts.make:linux: npm run build:ui && electron-forge make --platform linux --arch x64
scripts.pear:prepare:win: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('out/win', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('out/win', {recursive:true}); fs.renameSync('out/peercord-win32-x64', 'out/win/peercord');"
scripts.pear:prepare:linux: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('out/linux', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('out/linux', {recursive:true}); fs.renameSync('out/peercord-linux-x64', 'out/linux/peercord');"
scripts.release:win: npm run bump && npm run make:win && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:win && npm run pear:build:win && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:win:fast: npm run bump && npm run package:win && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:win && npm run pear:build:win && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:mac: npm run bump && npm run make:mac && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:mac && npm run pear:build:mac && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:mac:fast: npm run bump && npm run package:mac && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:mac && npm run pear:build:mac && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:linux: npm run bump && npm run make:linux && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:linux && npm run pear:build:linux && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:linux:fast: npm run bump && npm run package:linux && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:linux && npm run pear:build:linux && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:multi: npm run bump && npm run make:win && npm run make:linux && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:win && npm run pear:prepare:linux && npm run pear:build:multi && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
scripts.release:multi:fast: npm run bump && npm run package:win && npm run package:linux && npm run pear:clean && npm run pear:prepare:win && npm run pear:prepare:linux && npm run pear:build:multi && npm run pear:stage && npm run broadcast && npm run pear:seed
